ideation: This animation sequence will depict a sparkling effect using both arms. The arms will move in a wave-like motion, with the wrists slightly rotated to enhance the sparkling effect. The overall motion will be graceful and fluid, reflecting the light and airy nature of sparkles. Frame 1: Both arms start in a relaxed position at the sides. Frame 2: Both arms move upward and outward, wrists slightly rotated outward. Frame 3: Arms reach the peak of their upward motion, wrists rotated more outward, creating a sense of sparkle. Frame 4: Arms begin to return to their original position, wrists rotating inward. Frame 5: Arms return to their relaxed position at the sides.

frames.beat: arms hang relaxed, waiting to shimmer
arms lift and open, wrists twist outward
arms reach peak, wrists flare for a bright sparkle
arms begin to fall, wrists twist inward
arms settle back to rest, the sparkle fades
